description: Engineering plan to eliminate harness noise, preserve evidence chains, and ensure professional GitHub Issue generation with executable MREs.

WBS_1_0.name: Implement Persistent Collection Pool
WBS_1_0.description: Redesign db_adapter.py to use a pre-allocated collection pool instead of creating/dropping collections per iteration. This avoids Milvus metadata sync lag.
acceptance_criteria: L2 Gating Failed errors due to 'collection not found' are reduced to < 1%.
Collections are reused across iterations within a single run.
Each collection in the pool is verified with a Smoke Test search before use.

WBS_2_0.name: Atomic Documentation Snapshotting
WBS_2_0.description: Modify Agent 0 and Telemetry to save full, un-truncated Markdown documentation to a run-specific directory. Ensure Agent 6 has access to raw evidence.
acceptance_criteria: A full 'raw_docs.json' file exists in the .trae/runs/{run_id} folder.
Telemetry logs no longer truncate docs_context for the Issue Generation stage.
Evidence in GitHub Issues contains verbatim quotes from original docs.

WBS_3_0.name: MRE-Powered Bug Reporting
WBS_3_0.description: Inject Milvus Python SDK templates into Agent 6's context. Force the LLM to generate a standalone, executable script for each bug.
acceptance_criteria: GitHub Issue markdown files contain a 'Steps To Reproduce' section with a valid 'python' code block.
The generated code includes connection logic and specific parameters that triggered the bug.
Issue title and body strictly match the official Milvus bug report template.

milestones.name: Zero-Noise Testing Baseline
milestones.quality_gate: Run 10 iterations without a single 'Type-2' infrastructure error.

milestones.name: Submit-Ready Issue Production
milestones.quality_gate: Each discovered bug produces a .md file with 100% valid docs references and a copy-pasteable Python MRE.

recovery_policy.defect_wal: Every defect found by Agent 5 is immediately written to telemetry.jsonl as an atomic event.
recovery_policy.emergency_dump: On unhandled exception, main.py dumps the current state to emergency_dump.json.
